round1.text: What does {name} order at a coffee shop?
options: Something with caramel and whipped cream

round1.text: How does {name} act when they're running late?
options: Walks in casually like nothing happened

round1.text: What does {name} do at a party where they only know one person?
options: Sticks to that one person all night
Becomes the loudest person in the room

round1.text: What's {name}'s most annoying habit?
How does {name} handle losing at a board game?
What's {name}'s guilty pleasure food?
options: An entire pint of ice cream
A whole bag of chips, alone

round1.text: What does {name} do in the first 5 minutes of waking up?
options: Lies there spiralling about the day

round1.text: How does {name} reply to a long voice note?
options: Listens immediately and replies in detail
Sends back an even longer voice note

round1.text: What's {name}'s move when the group can't decide where to eat?
options: Just picks a place and tells everyone

round1.text: What does {name} do when they see a notification from someone they're avoiding?
options: Marks it as read and ignores
Replies eventually with a vague excuse

round2.text: What does {name} secretly judge their friends for?
options: Bad taste in music or movies

round2.text: What's {name}'s honest opinion on giving advice nobody asked for?
options: Holds back, then says it anyway

round2.text: What does {name} actually believe makes a good friend?
options: Knowing when to leave you alone

round2.text: What's {name}'s relationship with money?
What does {name} think people get most wrong about them?
options: That they're more confident than they are
That they're laid-back when they're not
That they have it all figured out

round2.text: What kind of friend is {name} in a crisis?
options: Goes quiet and doesn't know what to do

round2.text: What's {name}'s honest take on parties they've been invited to?
options: Always wants to go, always glad they did
Wants to go, regrets it by 11pm
Doesn't want to go, glad they did
Doesn't want to go, doesn't go

round2.text: How does {name} feel about being the centre of attention?
options: Pretends to hate it but secretly loves it

round2.text: What does {name} think they'd do if they won the lottery tomorrow?
options: Quit immediately, travel for a year
Tell almost no one, change very little
Spend it all in a year

round2.text: What's {name}'s view on staying friends with exes?
options: Possible in theory, never in practice
Depends entirely on who broke up with who

round3.text: What is {name} most insecure about that they'd never say out loud?
options: Where they are in life vs their friends
That they're not as smart as they let on

round3.text: What does {name} actually think about how their life is going?
What's {name}'s biggest fear about getting older?
What does {name} cry about that they wouldn't admit?
What's the lie {name} tells themselves most often?
What does {name} miss most from their younger self?
options: How easy it was to make friends

round3.text: What's the regret {name} thinks about most often?
options: A career path they didn't take
Something they didn't say in time
Time they spent on something that didn't matter

round3.text: Who in {name}'s life do they most want approval from?
What does {name} hope people remember them for?
What's the one thing {name} would change about themselves if they could?
options: Care less what other people think

round1.text: What side of the bed does {name} prefer?
What does {name} do when they want your attention?
What's {name}'s ideal date night?
options: An activity like bowling or cooking

round1.text: How does {name} show love without saying it?
What's {name}'s most annoying relationship habit?
options: Being on their phone during movies

round1.text: What does {name} look like when they're hangry?
What would {name} want for breakfast in bed?
options: Just coffee, don't talk to me

round1.text: How does {name} react to a spider in the house?
options: Ignore it and hope it leaves

round1.text: What does {name} hog most?
What's {name}'s texting style when you're apart?
Which household 'crime' is {name} most guilty of?
options: The 'floordrobe'—clothes that are neither clean nor dirty
Starting the dishwasher but never actually emptying it

round1.text: What is {name}'s ideal 'lazy' date night?
options: Ordering the exact same takeout as last time and a movie
Parallel play: both on phones/laptops but touching feet
A long drive with a specific playlist and no destination
Deep-diving into a niche YouTube documentary together

round1.text: How does {name} usually announce they are hungry?
options: A subtle, polite 'What are you thinking for dinner?'
Getting increasingly cranky (hangry) until you notice
The 'I'll eat anything' lie (they will reject the first 3 options)
Sending a link to a menu or a food photo with no context

round1.text: What is {name}'s 'social battery' limit when you're out together?
options: The 'Early Bird': Ready to go as soon as the main event ends
The 'Vibe Checker': Stays as long as the music/energy is good
The 'Marathoner': Always the last to leave
The 'Look': They give you a specific facial expression that means 'leave now'

round1.text: What is {name}'s most specific domestic quirk?
options: A very particular way the bed must be made
An irrational hatred of a specific chore (e.g., the bins)
Needing to 'decompress' in total silence for 20 minutes after work
A bizarrely organized ritual for their morning routine

round2.text: What does {name} need most after a hard day?
What's {name}'s love language?
What would {name} sacrifice last?
Where does {name} see you both in 5 years?
What topic does {name} avoid talking about?
What does {name} think makes a relationship last?
What's {name}'s way of apologising after a fight?
options: Cracking a joke to break the ice

round2.text: What's the one thing {name} wishes you did more of?
How does {name} handle jealousy?
What would upset {name} most in a relationship?
Which 'Love Language' does {name} actually value most in a partner?
options: Acts of Service: Doing the thing they didn't want to do
Words of Affirmation: Specific, unprompted compliments
Quality Time: Phones away, focused attention
Physical Touch: Constant, low-key physical proximity

round2.text: How does {name} handle a heated argument?
options: The Lawyer: Debating points with logic and facts
The Exploder: Everything comes out at once, then they're fine
The Turtle: Needs to retreat and process before speaking
The Peacemaker: Tries to fix it or apologize immediately to end the tension

round2.text: What is {name}'s biggest 'green flag' in a relationship?
options: Being able to sit in comfortable silence together
Matching their level of ambition and drive
A sense of humor that perfectly mirrors their own

round2.text: What does {name} find most difficult to share with you?
options: When they are feeling inadequate or 'not enough'
When they are annoyed by something small you did

round2.text: If you both had a completely free day, what would {name} want to prioritize?
options: Productivity: Ticking off life goals or errands together
Rest: Deep recovery and zero responsibilities
Adventure: Going somewhere new or doing an activity
Connection: Focused time to talk and reconnect

round3.text: What does {name} secretly worry about in this relationship?
What's the hardest thing for {name} to say to you?
What does {name} value most about you?
options: How safe you make them feel

round3.text: What's {name}'s biggest relationship fear?
What would {name} change about how you argue?
options: Resolve faster, don't let it simmer

round3.text: What makes {name} feel most loved by you?
options: When you remember the little things
When you choose them over other plans
When you just sit with them in silence

round3.text: What has {name} learned about themselves from being with you?
options: That they're more patient than they thought
That they deserve to be loved well

round3.text: What moment in your relationship does {name} replay the most?
options: An inside joke that always lands
A time you showed up when it mattered

round3.text: If {name} could relive one day with you, what kind of day?
options: An ordinary day that just felt perfect

round3.text: What does {name} need to hear from you right now but hasn't asked for?
options: 'You don't have to be strong all the time'

round3.text: What is {name}'s deepest 'relationship fear'?
options: Becoming 'boring' or stagnant as a couple
Losing their individual identity within the partnership
Waking up one day and realizing the spark is gone
Being a burden to you during hard times

round3.text: What is something {name} often needs from you but struggles to voice?
options: To be told they are attractive/desired without asking
To be given more 'mental load' support without prompting
To be checked in on when they seem 'fine'
To have their boundaries respected without having to defend them

round3.text: How has {name}'s view of love changed since being with you?
options: It feels more like a choice/commitment than just a feeling
They feel safer to be 'messy' and imperfect
They've realized they don't have to do everything alone
They've learned that conflict doesn't always lead to ending

round3.text: What part of {name}'s personality do they feel you 'get' better than anyone else?
options: Their weird sense of humor that others find confusing
Their underlying anxiety that they mask with confidence
The way they show love through small, invisible actions

round3.text: If {name} could change one 'dynamic' in the relationship, what would it be?
options: Finding a better balance of household/life responsibilities
Deepening the emotional intimacy even further

round1.text: How does {name} signal they're in the mood without saying it?
options: A specific kind of eye contact
Hand on your thigh under the table
Suddenly very interested in what you're doing

round1.text: What's the fastest way to flip {name}'s switch from chill to charged?
options: Just looking at them a beat too long

round1.text: How does {name} flirt when they want something to happen tonight?
options: Subtle touches that pretend to be accidents
Making you laugh until you can't help yourself

round1.text: What's {name}'s tell that they're about to make a move?
options: Gets weirdly close in a small space
Smirks at you out of nowhere

round1.text: Where does {name} like to be kissed first?
What's {name}'s favourite pre-bed move that isn't bed yet?
How does {name} like to be touched when you're just lying together?
What does {name} actually want to hear when things start escalating?
options: Exactly what you want to do to them

round1.text: What does {name} do with their hands when they're getting turned on?
options: Grips the back of your neck
Pulls you in by the waist

round1.text: What kind of pace gets {name} going?
options: Whatever you're in the mood for

round2.text: What's {name}'s biggest non-physical turn-on?
options: Confidence in front of other people
Watching you be good at something
Being told exactly what they want

round2.text: When is {name} most in the mood?
What setting gets {name} going more than they admit?
What do you do that turns {name} on without you realising?
options: The way you look at them
How you handle yourself in public
When you take charge of a small thing

round2.text: What kind of energy is {name} most attracted to in the moment?
What's {name}'s favourite thing about your body?
options: A small detail you'd never guess
It changes depending on the day

round2.text: What does {name} secretly find sexy that sounds boring on paper?
options: You doing chores without being asked
You being good with their family

round2.text: What's {name}'s ideal frequency, honestly?
options: When the mood hits, no schedule

round2.text: What do you wear that {name} reacts to most?
What tone of voice makes {name} pay attention?
options: Teasing, like you know something they don't

round3.text: What's a fantasy {name} has thought about but won't bring up first?
options: Being in charge of every move

round3.text: What kink is {name} curious about but hasn't asked for?
What's {name}'s honest opinion on threesomes?
options: Genuinely up for it with the right person
Fantasy only — wouldn't actually do it

round3.text: What's something {name} secretly wants more of in bed?
What's {name}'s real number?
options: Exactly what they say it is

round3.text: Who's the one person from {name}'s past they still think about?
options: Someone they hooked up with once

round3.text: What's {name}'s biggest sexual regret?
options: Something they didn't try when they had the chance

round3.text: How adventurous is {name} actually willing to be?
options: Way more than they let on
Knows exactly what they like and stays there

round3.text: What's {name}'s position on watching adult content together?
options: Curious but never brought it up

round3.text: What does {name} want to try that they think you might say no to?
options: Something with a specific power dynamic
